launcher_subtitles.launcher_root: Start 2D, 3D, or 4D directly, replay the last persisted mode, open help, view scores, or enter Advanced tools.
launcher_subtitles.launcher_play: Choose a dimension, use Left/Right to switch between Play and Setup, reopen the last custom topology, or use play-adjacent tools.
launcher_subtitles.launcher_tutorials: Choose guided learning, controls reference, or support.
launcher_subtitles.default: Up/Down select and Enter open actions.

branding.signature_message: Enjoy! Please contact me for criticisms, suggestions, requests, partmnetships, and don't hesitate to vent off your frustration.

launcher.info_active_profile_template: Active key profile: {profile} (switch: [ ] or -/= or PgUp/PgDn)
launcher.controls_hint_action_group_template: Up/Down select   Left/Right choose Play/Setup   Enter open   {escape_hint}
launcher.controls_hint_action_group_template_tiny: I/K select   J/L choose Play/Setup   Enter open   {escape_hint}

settings_hub.title: Settings
settings_hub.subtitle_categories_template: Open settings pages from the unified registry: {categories}
hints: Up/Down select   Left/Right adjust   Enter activate
Enter opens subpages, activates actions, or confirms selectors
Type digits on width, height, seed, or animation timing rows for direct numeric entry
Overflowing pages scroll automatically and show a shared scrollbar
F5 save   F8 reset defaults   Backspace back   Esc exit   Q quit
settings_hub.reset_confirm_f8: Press F8 again to confirm reset defaults

keybindings_menu.title: Keybindings
keybindings_menu.subtitle_section_mode: Up/Down select section, Enter open, Backspace back, Esc exit, Q quit
keybindings_menu.subtitle_binding_mode: Up/Down select, Enter rebind, Tab sections, Backspace back, Q quit
hints: L load   S save   F3 save as   F2 rename   F6 reset (confirm)
[ ] or -/= or PgUp/PgDn profile prev/next   N new profile   Backspace delete custom profile
C conflict mode cycle   Enter capture   Tab sections   Backspace back   Q quit
section_hints: Enter open section   Up/Down select section   Backspace back   Esc exit   Q quit
[ ] or -/= or PgUp/PgDn profile prev/next   N new profile   F2 rename   F3 save as

bot_options.title: Bot Options
bot_options.subtitle: Dimension-specific bot controls in one place
hints: F5 save   F8 reset defaults   Backspace back   Esc exit   Q quit
bot_options.reset_confirm_enter: Press Enter on Reset defaults again to confirm
bot_options.reset_confirm_f8: Press F8 again to confirm reset defaults

setup_menu.subtitle_template: Use Up/Down to select, Left/Right to change, Enter to start. Setup keeps safe presets only; open Topology Playground or Play Last Custom Topology for custom topology.
setup_menu.subtitle_2d: Use Up/Down to select, Left/Right to change, Enter to start, Backspace back, Esc exit, Q quit.
setup_menu.bindings_hint_template: L = load keys, S = save keys ({bindings_file_hint})
setup_menu.compact_controls_hint: Arrows navigate   Enter start   Backspace back   Esc exit   Q quit

2d: Use Main Menu -> Settings for Random type.
Use Topology Playground or Play Last Custom Topology for custom topology.
Use Main Menu -> Bot Options / Keybindings for shared controls.
Controls are shown in-game on the side panel.
3d: Use Main Menu -> Settings for Random type.
Use Topology Playground or Play Last Custom Topology for custom topology.
Use Main Menu -> Bot Options / Keybindings for shared controls.
Controls are shown in-game on the side panel.
4d: Use Main Menu -> Settings for Random type.
Use Topology Playground or Play Last Custom Topology for custom topology.
Use Main Menu -> Bot Options / Keybindings for shared controls.
Controls are shown in-game on the side panel.
